privacy.s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacy.s1.intro: Tool Box Nova is designed with privacy at its core. We do not collect, store, or share any personal information you input into our tools. Specifically:
privacy.s1.li1: Passwords generated are never transmitted to our servers
privacy.s1.li2: Virtual addresses generated are never stored
privacy.s1.li3: Temporary email addresses are deleted after expiry
privacy.s2.title: 2. Cookies
privacy.s2.desc: We use a single cookie to remember your language preference (lang). This cookie contains no personally identifiable information and is not used for tracking.
privacy.s3.title: 3. Analytics
privacy.s3.desc: We may use privacy-respecting analytics (such as aggregated page view counts) to understand which tools are most useful. No individual user data is collected.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
privacy.s4.desc: Some tools (such as SMS Receiver) may interface with third-party APIs. These services have their own privacy policies. We recommend reviewing them before use.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Google Ads
privacy.s5.desc: We may display Google Ads on this site. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits. You can opt out via Google Ad Settings.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Contact
privacy.s6.desc: For privacy-related questions, please contact us.

ailab.detector.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
ailab.detector.faq.q1: How accurate is the AI detector?
ailab.detector.faq.a1: Our AI detector achieves 99% accuracy across diverse text samples, tested against GPTZero, Originality.AI, and other leading tools. It detects content from ChatGPT, GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and all major AI models.
ailab.detector.faq.q2: Which AI detectors does it check against?
ailab.detector.faq.a2: We simulate scores from 8 major AI detectors: GPTZero, Turnitin, Copyleaks, ZeroGPT, Writer.com, Sapling, Originality.AI, and Winston AI — all in one click.
ailab.detector.faq.q3: How does the AI humanizer work?
ailab.detector.faq.a3: Our humanizer uses advanced language models to rewrite AI-generated text, preserving your original meaning while introducing natural human writing patterns — varied sentence structure, idiomatic expressions, and authentic tone.
ailab.detector.faq.q4: Is my text stored or shared?
ailab.detector.faq.a4: No. Your text is processed in real-time and never stored on our servers. We take privacy seriously and comply with GDPR.
ailab.detector.faq.a5: Both AI detection and humanization support 50+ languages including English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Arabic, Hindi, and more.
ailab.detector.faq.a6: Free users can check up to 15,000 characters per request — the highest free limit among all major competitors. No signup required.
ailab.detector.faq.a7: Our humanizer significantly reduces AI detection scores across all major detectors including Turnitin. Our tests show a 95%+ success rate with Enhanced and Ultra modes.

img.compress.name: Image Compress
img.compress.seo.title: Free Online Image Compressor — Compress JPG, PNG, WebP | Tool Box Nova
img.compress.seo.desc: Free online image compressor — no server upload, no registration. Compress JPG, PNG and WebP images by up to 90% directly in your browser using Canvas API and WebAssembly. Batch compress up to 20 images at once, convert between formats (JPG/PNG/WebP/GIF/BMP), resize images by setting a max width, and download all results as a ZIP archive. Your files never leave your device — 100% private and secure. Perfect for web developers optimizing page speed, bloggers reducing image file sizes, and anyone who wants fast, free, lossless-quality image compression without installing software.
img.compress.hero.title: Online Image Compression Tool
img.compress.hero.subtitle: Compress JPG, PNG, WebP in bulk — browser-only, no server upload, completely free
img.compress.upload.title: Drag and drop images here, or click to select files
img.compress.upload.multi: Supports uploading up to 20 images at once
img.compress.upload.hint: Supports all image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, etc.), max 10MB per image
img.compress.options.quality.label: Compression Quality
img.compress.options.quality.hint: Lower quality = smaller file size, but reduced image quality
img.compress.options.format.label: Output Format
img.compress.options.maxwidth.label: Max Width (optional)
img.compress.options.maxwidth.hint: Leave blank for no scaling, if filled image width will not exceed this value
img.compress.feature.privacy.title: Privacy & Security
img.compress.feature.privacy.desc: All images are processed locally in your browser, never uploaded to any server
img.compress.feature.fast.title: Lightning Fast
img.compress.feature.fast.desc: Based on WebAssembly technology, high-speed compression in browser, no upload/download wait
img.compress.feature.free.title: Completely Free
img.compress.feature.free.desc: No usage limit, no file count limit, all features permanently free
img.compress.desc: Compress JPG, PNG and WebP images intelligently — dramatically smaller files with visually lossless quality
img.compress.options.title: Compression Settings
img.compress.s1.label: How it works
img.compress.s1.title: Compress images in three simple steps
img.compress.s1.body: No software to install. Everything runs directly in your browser using the Canvas API — your files never leave your device.
img.compress.s1.step1.title: Upload your images
img.compress.s1.step1.desc: Drag & drop or click to select up to 20 images at once. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.
img.compress.s1.step2.title: Adjust settings
img.compress.s1.step2.desc: Set your preferred quality (1–100), choose an output format, or cap the maximum width. Changes apply instantly.
img.compress.s1.step3.title: Download compressed files
img.compress.s1.step3.desc: Download each image individually or grab them all in a single ZIP archive with one click.
img.compress.s2.label: Smart compression
img.compress.s2.title: Reduce file size without sacrificing quality
img.compress.s2.body1: Our browser-side compression engine intelligently removes invisible data from your images. A typical JPEG can be reduced by 40–80% while still looking crisp on any screen.
img.compress.s2.body2: The quality slider gives you full control. Slide to the left for maximum savings, or keep it high when pixel-perfect fidelity matters — like product photos or portfolio shots.
img.compress.s3.label: Format support
img.compress.s3.title: Compress & convert every major format
img.compress.s3.body: Whether you're working with photos, graphics, or web assets, we handle all common image formats. You can even convert between them during compression.
img.compress.s3.fmt.jpg: Best for photographs and complex images with many colors. Adjustable lossy compression keeps quality high while shrinking file size dramatically.
img.compress.s3.fmt.png: Lossless format ideal for graphics, logos, and images with transparency. We reduce PNG size by optimizing color depth and metadata.
img.compress.s3.fmt.webp: Google's modern format delivers 25–35% smaller files than JPEG at equivalent quality. Perfect for web pages that need fast load times.
img.compress.s3.fmt.resize.name: Resize on compress
img.compress.s3.fmt.resize.desc: Set a maximum width to automatically downscale oversized images. Aspect ratio is always preserved — no stretching or distortion.
img.compress.s4.label: 100% private
img.compress.s4.title: Your images never leave your browser
img.compress.s4.body1: Unlike most online image tools, we never upload your files to a server. Every byte of processing happens locally using the browser's Canvas API and WebAssembly.
img.compress.s4.body2: This means your personal photos, confidential documents, or proprietary design assets stay completely private — always. No account required, no data stored, no tracking of your files.
img.compress.s5.label: Batch processing
img.compress.s5.title: Compress up to 20 images at once
img.compress.s5.body1: No need to compress images one by one. Drop a whole folder of images and compress them all simultaneously. When you're done, download everything in a single ZIP file — saving time on projects big and small.
img.compress.s5.body2: Each image in the batch shows its individual compression ratio and the exact bytes saved, so you always know what you're getting. Re-compress with different settings anytime without re-uploading.
img.compress.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
img.compress.s6.label: About this tool
img.compress.s6.title: The best free online image compressor — fast, private, and powerful
img.compress.s6.body1: This free online image compressor lets you reduce the file size of JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, and BMP images directly in your browser — no upload to any server required. Whether you need to compress photos for a website, optimize images for faster page loading, shrink attachments before sending by email, or batch-process hundreds of product images, this tool handles it all instantly without any software installation.
img.compress.s6.body2: Unlike cloud-based tools like TinyPNG or Squoosh that send your files to remote servers, all compression here runs 100% locally using the browser's Canvas API and WebAssembly technology. Your images never leave your device — making this the safest choice for sensitive photos, confidential documents, or proprietary design assets. There is no registration, no file-size quota, and no daily limit.
img.compress.s6.body3: Key features include: batch compression of up to 20 images at once, adjustable quality slider (1–100%) for full control over file size vs. visual fidelity, one-click format conversion between JPG, PNG, and WebP, automatic resizing by setting a maximum width, and ZIP download for all compressed results. Start compressing your images for free — just drag, drop, and download.

img.resize.about.title: The most powerful free image resizer online
img.resize.about.body1: This free online image resizer lets you resize JPG, PNG and WebP images in seconds — no software installation, no account required, and your files never leave your browser. Whether you need to resize photos for a website, social media post, email attachment, or print project, this tool covers every scenario with pixel-perfect precision.
img.resize.about.body2: Resize by exact pixel dimensions, percentage scale (10%–200%), or choose from 12+ built-in social media presets including Instagram Post (1080×1080), Instagram Story (1080×1920), Facebook Cover (820×312), YouTube Thumbnail (1280×720), Twitter/X Post (1200×675), and LinkedIn Post (1200×627). All presets are kept up to date with each platform's current recommended sizes.
img.resize.about.body3: Unlike most online tools, all resizing happens 100% locally in your browser using the Canvas API — meaning zero server upload, zero privacy risk, and results in under a second even for large files. Batch up to 20 images at once, lock or unlock aspect ratio, choose output format (JPG, PNG, WebP), adjust output quality, and download all results in a single ZIP archive.

img.metadata.feature.gps.desc: Images with GPS data show an interactive OpenStreetMap preview of where the photo was taken.

img.metadata.faq.title: FAQ
img.metadata.about.label: About
img.metadata.about.title: The most complete free image metadata viewer online
img.metadata.about.body1: This free online image metadata viewer lets you instantly read EXIF, GPS, IPTC and XMP data hidden inside JPG, PNG, WebP, TIFF and HEIC files — directly in your browser, with no file upload to any server. Photographers, journalists, developers and privacy-conscious users all rely on metadata viewers to understand the full story behind an image.
img.metadata.about.body2: For GPS-tagged photos, an interactive OpenStreetMap preview shows the exact location where the photo was taken. Camera settings like ISO, aperture, shutter speed, focal length and lens model are displayed from EXIF data. Copyright and author information from IPTC fields, plus any custom XMP tags, are all extracted and shown in clearly organised sections.
img.metadata.about.body3: Export all metadata as JSON for developers, CSV for spreadsheet analysis, or plain TXT for quick reading. Process up to 10 images simultaneously to compare metadata side by side. Because everything runs locally, your private photos — including sensitive GPS coordinates and personal data — never touch an external server. Use it to verify metadata before sharing images, strip hidden tracking data, or audit photo archives.

qr.about.body1: This free online QR code generator supports 8 content types: URL, vCard contact card, plain text, SMS, email, WiFi auto-connect, Twitter/X post, and Bitcoin payment. Each type has dedicated input fields so your QR code always encodes the correct format — no manual formatting required. Generate, preview, and download your QR code in seconds.
qr.about.body2: Customise every visual aspect of your QR code: choose dot shapes (square, rounded, dots, classy), corner frame styles, foreground and background colors with full gradient support, and embed your own logo or brand icon in the center. The real-time preview updates as you type so you always see exactly what you'll get before downloading.
qr.about.body3: Download in PNG (up to 2000×2000px), SVG (infinitely scalable), JPG, or EPS format for print and web. All generation happens locally in your browser — no data is sent to any server, keeping business URLs, WiFi passwords and personal contact details completely private. No sign-up, no watermarks, no daily limits. Trusted by marketers, developers, restaurant owners and event organisers worldwide.

hero.crop.title: Crop Image Online
hero.crop.subtitle: Select any area or use preset ratios. Fast, free, and processed entirely in your browser.
hero.crop.about.label: About
hero.crop.about.title: The most precise free image cropping tool online
hero.crop.about.body1: This free online image cropper lets you crop JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP and SVG images with pixel-level precision — no software download, no account, and files never leave your browser. Whether you need a square crop for a profile photo, a 16:9 widescreen banner, or a custom-sized product image, this tool handles every use case instantly.
hero.crop.about.body2: Choose from three cropping modes: free-form selection for complete creative control, fixed aspect ratio (1:1 square, 4:3 standard, 16:9 widescreen) for consistent results across multiple images, or custom pixel dimensions for exact output sizes. An interactive crop preview lets you drag, zoom and reposition the crop area before saving.
hero.crop.about.body3: Batch process up to 30 images at once — apply the same crop settings to an entire product catalog or social media batch in one go. Download individual results or grab everything as a ZIP. Unlike Photoshop or paid editors, this tool is 100% free, works in any browser, and processes everything locally for complete privacy.
hero.to_jpg.title: Convert Image to JPG
hero.to_jpg.subtitle: Convert PNG, WEBP, GIF, SVG and more to JPG with adjustable quality. All local, all free.
hero.to_jpg.about.label: About
hero.to_jpg.about.title: The fastest free image to JPG converter online
hero.to_jpg.about.body1: This free online converter turns PNG, WEBP, GIF, BMP and SVG images into high-quality JPG files in seconds — directly in your browser, with no file upload to any server. JPG is the most widely supported image format on the web, ideal for photographs, blog images, product shots and email attachments where small file sizes matter.
hero.to_jpg.about.body2: A quality slider (1–100%) gives you precise control over file size vs. visual quality. Set quality to 85–95% for nearly lossless results at a fraction of the original file size, or go lower for maximum compression when bandwidth is a priority. Batch convert up to 30 images simultaneously.
hero.to_jpg.about.body3: All processing runs locally using the Canvas API, so your images stay completely private. No watermarks, no limits, no sign-up. Download individual files or all results as a ZIP. Works on Windows, Mac, iOS and Android — no installation needed.
hero.jpg_to.title: Convert JPG to Any Format
hero.jpg_to.subtitle: Export your JPG images as PNG, WEBP, GIF or BMP in seconds. No server, no waiting.
hero.jpg_to.about.label: About
hero.jpg_to.about.title: The most flexible free JPG converter online
hero.jpg_to.about.body1: This free online JPG converter exports your JPEG images to PNG, WebP, GIF or BMP — instantly, in your browser, without uploading files to any server. Need transparent backgrounds? Convert JPG to PNG. Want the smallest file size for web use? Convert to WebP. Need maximum compatibility? BMP has you covered.
hero.jpg_to.about.body2: WebP conversion is particularly valuable for web developers and SEO professionals: WebP files are typically 25–35% smaller than equivalent JPEGs, reducing page load times and improving Core Web Vitals scores. The converter maintains full color fidelity and supports adjustable quality for JPG to WebP conversions.
hero.jpg_to.about.body3: Process up to 30 images at once and download all results in a ZIP archive. The AI model loads once and runs locally — no subscription, no watermarks, no credits system. Works on Windows, Mac, iOS and Android in any modern browser.
hero.editor.title: Online Photo Editor
hero.editor.subtitle: Adjust brightness, contrast, saturation and more with real-time preview. Simple and powerful.
hero.editor.about.label: About
hero.editor.about.title: A powerful free photo editor that runs entirely in your browser
hero.editor.about.body1: This free online photo editor lets you enhance images by adjusting brightness, contrast, saturation, sharpness and blur — with a real-time preview that updates as you move each slider. No Photoshop subscription, no app download, no account required. Just open your image and start editing instantly.
hero.editor.about.body2: The non-destructive editing workflow means your original file is never modified — every adjustment is applied in real time on a canvas preview, and you only save when you're happy with the result. This makes it safe to experiment with dramatic contrast boosts, vivid saturation, or subtle sharpening without risk.
hero.editor.about.body3: Batch process up to 30 images with the same settings — perfect for normalising a product photo shoot or standardising blog images. Export as JPG, PNG or WebP. All editing happens locally using the Canvas API, completely private and instantaneous even on large files. Compatible with all modern browsers on desktop and mobile.
hero.remove_bg.title: Remove Image Background
hero.remove_bg.subtitle: AI-powered background removal running entirely in your browser. Private, instant, free.
hero.remove_bg.about.label: About
hero.remove_bg.about.title: AI background removal that runs 100% in your browser
hero.remove_bg.about.body1: This free AI background remover uses a local WebAssembly AI model to cut out image backgrounds instantly — with no file upload to any server. It delivers professional results comparable to remove.bg or Canva's background remover, but with one critical advantage: your images never leave your device, making it safe for confidential product photos and personal portraits.
hero.remove_bg.about.body2: The AI model automatically detects the subject of your image — person, product, animal, object — and separates it from the background with smooth, precise edges. The result is a transparent PNG ready to drop onto any background in Photoshop, Canva, PowerPoint or your web store. A threshold slider lets you fine-tune edge detection for tricky subjects.
hero.remove_bg.about.body3: Process up to 30 images in batch mode — ideal for e-commerce sellers who need consistent white-background product photos at scale. The AI model loads once and runs locally, so subsequent images process in seconds. No subscription, no watermarks on output, no credits system. Just open, remove, and download.
hero.watermark.title: Add Watermark to Image
hero.watermark.subtitle: Protect your photos with custom text or logo watermarks. Choose position, opacity and more.
hero.watermark.about.label: About
hero.watermark.about.title: Professional watermark tool — text and logo, free online
hero.watermark.about.body1: This free online watermark tool lets you protect your photos and artwork by adding custom text or image (logo) watermarks. Choose your watermark position from a 9-point grid, set opacity from 10% to 100%, and adjust font size and color for text watermarks — all with an instant preview before saving.
hero.watermark.about.body2: Text watermarks support any Unicode characters, making them ideal for copyright notices (© 2025 Your Name), studio signatures, social media handles (@yourbrand), or custom messages in any language. Image watermarks accept PNG files with transparency, perfect for logo overlays on product photos and portfolios.
hero.watermark.about.body3: Batch watermark up to 30 images at once — apply your brand logo to an entire product catalog in one operation. Everything runs locally in your browser, so your original photos and watermark assets never leave your device. No sign-up, no subscription, no output watermarks from the tool itself. Download individual results or all as a ZIP.
hero.rotate.title: Rotate & Flip Image
hero.rotate.subtitle: Rotate by any angle or flip your images horizontally and vertically. Supports batch processing.
hero.rotate.about.label: About
hero.rotate.about.title: Rotate and flip images online — any angle, free and instant
hero.rotate.about.body1: This free online image rotation tool lets you rotate JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP and SVG images by any angle from -360° to 360°, and flip them horizontally or vertically — all directly in your browser without uploading files to a server. Fix sideways photos, create mirror effects, or prepare images for specific display orientations in seconds.
hero.rotate.about.body2: Four quick-action buttons handle the most common operations: Rotate 90° Left, Rotate 90° Right, Flip Horizontal and Flip Vertical. For precise custom angles, simply type any value — useful for straightening slightly tilted horizon lines, correcting scanned document rotation, or creating diagonal compositions.
hero.rotate.about.body3: Batch process up to 30 images simultaneously — apply the same rotation and flip to an entire folder of photos, then download all results as a ZIP. All processing happens locally using the Canvas API: zero upload wait time, complete privacy. No watermarks, no limits, no account needed. Works on all modern browsers.

pc.seo.title: Privacy Account Checker — Check If Your Email & Password Were Leaked | ToolboxNova
pc.seo.description: Free privacy security tool to check if your email or password has been exposed in data breaches. Uses HIBP k-Anonymity — your password never leaves the browser.
pc.seo.og_title: Privacy Account Checker — Were You Breached?
pc.seo.og_desc: Check email breaches, test password safety, browse leak events, and generate secure passwords. 100% free, your data stays in your browser.
pc.hero.title: Is Your Account Safe?
pc.hero.subtitle: Check if your email or password has been exposed in data breaches. Powered by the world's largest breach database.
pc.hero.privacy_banner: Your data never leaves your browser
pc.email.safe_desc: Your email was not found in any known data breaches. Keep practicing good security habits!
pc.email.pwned_desc: Your email was found in {count} data breach(es). Review the details below and take action.
pc.password.safe_desc: This password was not found in any known data breaches. However, this doesn't guarantee it's strong enough.
pc.password.pwned_desc: This password has appeared {count} time(s) in data breaches. Change it immediately!
pc.password.privacy_note: Your password is hashed locally. Only the first 5 characters of the hash are sent for lookup.
pc.strength.title: Password Strength Analysis
pc.generator.title: Secure Password Generator
pc.generator.placeholder: Click generate to create a password
pc.breaches.title: Data Breach Browser
pc.breaches.subtitle: Explore known data breach events worldwide and check if your accounts are at risk

pc.advice.check_reuse: Check if you reused this password on other sites
pc.advice.use_manager: Use a password manager for unique, strong passwords
pc.advice.monitor_account: Monitor your account for suspicious activity
pc.advice.freeze_credit: Consider freezing your credit if financial data was exposed
pc.advice.phishing_alert: Be alert for phishing emails referencing this breach
pc.status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
pc.status.fallback: Our breach database is temporarily unavailable. Here are general security recommendations.
pc.error.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
pc.error.empty_password: Please enter a password to check
pc.error.turnstile_failed: Security verification failed. Please refresh and try again.
pc.error.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
pc.feature.privacy_desc: Passwords are hashed locally in your browser. We use k-Anonymity — only a 5-character hash prefix is ever transmitted. Your actual password never leaves your device.
pc.feature.speed_desc: Backed by Cloudflare's global CDN with 99.9% cache hit rates. Get breach results in milliseconds, not seconds.
pc.feature.free_desc: No sign-up, no subscription, no hidden fees. Check unlimited emails and passwords at no cost whatsoever.
pc.faq.q1: How does the email breach check work?
pc.faq.a1: We query a global breach database through our secure server-side interface. Your email is sent to our server for a safe lookup and the results are returned directly. We never store your email address.
pc.faq.q2: Is my password safe when I check it here?
pc.faq.a2: Absolutely. Your password is hashed using SHA-1 directly in your browser. Only the first 5 characters of the hash are sent to our server. Your actual password never leaves your browser — this is called k-Anonymity.
pc.faq.q3: What should I do if my email appears in a breach?
pc.faq.a3: Change the password for the affected account immediately. Enable two-factor authentication wherever possible. Use our built-in password generator to create a strong, unique password.
pc.faq.q4: How is this different from Have I Been Pwned?
pc.faq.a4: We provide the same breach database plus additional features: real-time password strength analysis, a secure password generator, multilingual support, and personalized security recommendations.
pc.faq.q5: Do you store any of my data?
pc.faq.a5: No. We operate on a zero-storage policy. Email queries are proxied in real-time and discarded. Passwords are hashed client-side and never transmitted in full.
pc.toast.copy_failed: Failed to copy. Please select and copy manually.

wq.feature.accurate_desc: Powered by ECMWF and GFS global models — the same data used by professional meteorologists.
wq.feature.fast_desc: Results in under 1 second. No server round-trip — weather data loaded directly from Open-Meteo CDN.
wq.feature.free_desc: No registration, no API key, no usage limits. Open-Meteo is a non-commercial, open-source API.
wq.faq.section_subtitle: Common questions about the real-time global weather query tool
wq.faq.q1: Is this weather tool completely free?
wq.faq.a1: Yes, ToolboxNova's weather query tool is completely free. It uses the Open-Meteo public API with no API key, no account registration, and no usage limits.
wq.faq.q2: How accurate are the weather forecasts?
wq.faq.a2: We use ECMWF and GFS global meteorological model data, updated every 1-6 hours. Accuracy is highest within 48 hours; 7-day forecasts are reliable for planning, and 14-day forecasts indicate general trends.
wq.faq.q3: What air quality data is provided?
wq.faq.a3: We display the US AQI index (0-300+) and real-time concentrations of PM2.5, PM10, O₃ (ozone), NO₂, SO₂, and CO. Data comes from the Copernicus CAMS atmospheric monitoring model.
wq.faq.q4: Can I check historical weather data?
wq.faq.a4: Yes. Switch to the '30-Day History' tab to view daily high/low temperatures and precipitation for the past month, retrieved free via the Open-Meteo Archive API.
wq.faq.q5: How do I share weather information?
wq.faq.a5: Click the 'Save Weather Snapshot' button to generate a beautifully formatted weather card image, ready to download or share on social media platforms.
wq.faq.q6: How often is the data updated?
wq.faq.a6: Current conditions refresh every 15 minutes; forecast data updates every 1-6 hours. The 'Updated at' timestamp in the metrics grid shows the exact last refresh time.
wq.faq.q7: Which languages can I use to search for cities?
wq.faq.a7: The search box accepts city names in Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and many more languages. The geocoding engine matches against a database of 3 million+ cities worldwide.
wq.faq.q8: How do I use the weather map?
wq.faq.a8: In the Weather Map panel, choose from five layers: Temperature, Precipitation, Wind Speed, Cloud Cover, and Pressure. The map uses real-time OpenWeatherMap satellite tiles and is fully zoomable.
wq.faq.q9: Can I change the temperature unit?
wq.faq.a9: Yes. Use the °C / °F toggle buttons at the top of the current weather card. Wind speed can be switched between km/h, mph, and m/s. Your preferences are automatically saved locally.
wq.faq.q10: What does the UV Index mean?
wq.faq.a10: The UV Index measures the intensity of solar ultraviolet radiation: 0-2 Low (no protection needed), 3-5 Moderate (apply sunscreen), 6-7 High (sunscreen + hat required), 8-10 Very High (avoid midday sun), 11+ Extreme (stay indoors). It typically peaks around solar noon on clear summer days.
wq.home.desc: Real-time global weather · 14-day forecast · AQI · Wind maps
wq.world_map.title: Explore Weather Anywhere on the Globe
wq.world_map.subtitle: Click anywhere on the map to instantly get real-time weather for that location
wq.world_map.click_hint: Click on the map to view weather
wq.content.section1_body: Weather is the state of the atmosphere at a particular time and place — a complex interplay of temperature, humidity, pressure, wind, and precipitation. Unlike climate, which describes long-term patterns, weather can change dramatically within hours. Modern meteorological forecasting leverages satellite imagery, Doppler radar, weather balloons, and supercomputer-driven models like ECMWF and GFS to make predictions with remarkable accuracy. With our real-time weather tool, you get the same data that professional forecasters rely on, delivered directly to your browser.
wq.content.section2_body: Today's forecasts begin with global observing networks — over 40,000 weather stations, thousands of weather balloons launched twice daily, ocean buoys, and a fleet of polar-orbiting satellites. This raw data feeds into Numerical Weather Prediction (NWP) models that divide the atmosphere into three-dimensional grids and solve equations of fluid dynamics, thermodynamics, and radiation physics. The European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF) and the US Global Forecast System (GFS) are among the most widely trusted. Our tool uses Open-Meteo, which seamlessly blends these model outputs for any coordinate on Earth.
wq.content.section3_body: The Air Quality Index (AQI) tells you how clean or polluted the outdoor air is and what associated health effects might be a concern. Our tool shows the US AQI scale (0–300+) along with concentrations of six key pollutants: fine particulate matter (PM2.5 and PM10), ground-level ozone (O₃), nitrogen dioxide (NO₂), sulfur dioxide (SO₂), and carbon monoxide (CO). Data comes from the Copernicus Atmosphere Monitoring Service (CAMS), a European initiative providing continuous global atmospheric composition data.
wq.content.section4_title: Reading the Wind: Beaufort Scale & Beyond
wq.content.section4_body: Wind speed is measured using the Beaufort scale (0–12), anemometers, and modern ultrasonic sensors. At the surface, wind direction profoundly influences local temperature — a northerly wind in winter brings Arctic air, while a southerly wind in summer can carry tropical moisture. Wind shear, the change of wind speed or direction with altitude, is a critical factor in thunderstorm development and aviation safety. Our weather map's wind layer visualizes surface wind patterns globally, updated every hour.
wq.content.section5_body: Rain, snow, sleet, and hail all begin high in clouds as tiny ice crystals or water droplets that collide and grow until gravity pulls them earthward. The type of precipitation that reaches the surface depends on the temperature profile through which it falls. A thin warm layer above freezing and cold air at the surface creates freezing rain — one of winter's most hazardous weather events. Our 14-day forecast shows daily precipitation probability and expected totals, so you can plan outdoor activities with confidence.
wq.content.section6_title: UV Index: Protecting Yourself from the Sun
wq.content.section6_body: The UV Index (UVI) is an international standard measurement of the strength of ultraviolet radiation from the Sun at a particular place and time. UV radiation is the primary cause of sunburn, premature skin aging, and skin cancer. The index runs from 0 (no risk at night) to 11+ (extreme risk during a clear summer midday). At UVI 3 or above, the WHO recommends applying broad-spectrum SPF 30+ sunscreen, wearing protective clothing, and seeking shade during midday hours (10am–4pm solar time).

ah.faq.q1: What is an AI Humanizer and how does it work?
ah.faq.a1: An AI Humanizer is a tool that rewrites AI-generated text to sound natural and human-like. Our tool analyzes patterns typical of AI writing and restructures the content using advanced language models, making it indistinguishable from human writing while preserving the original meaning.
ah.faq.q2: Which AI detectors can your tool bypass?
ah.faq.a2: Our AI Humanizer is designed to bypass all major AI detection tools including GPTZero, Turnitin, Copyleaks, ZeroGPT, Originality.ai, Winston AI, Sapling, and Scribbr. The Aggressive mode achieves the highest bypass rates.
ah.faq.q3: Is this tool completely free to use?
ah.faq.a3: Yes! All 6 humanization modes are 100% free with no word limits per session (up to 10,000 words per request). No account, no credit card, no hidden fees.
ah.faq.q4: What is the difference between the 6 humanization modes?
ah.faq.a4: Basic makes minimal changes for quick polishing. Standard balances quality and rewriting depth. Aggressive makes extensive restructuring for maximum undetectability. Academic preserves scholarly style and citations. Creative adds expressive flair. Business produces professional, formal output.
ah.faq.q5: Will humanizing my text change its meaning?
ah.faq.a5: Our tool is designed to preserve the core meaning, facts, and intent of your original text. It modifies sentence structure, word choice, and flow while keeping all key information intact.
ah.faq.q6: Does it support languages other than English?
ah.faq.a6: Yes! Our tool supports 12 languages including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Russian, Arabic, and Hindi.
ah.faq.q7: Can I upload PDF or Word documents?
ah.faq.a7: Absolutely. You can drag and drop or upload TXT, PDF, and DOCX files up to 10MB. The tool extracts the text and processes it directly.
ah.faq.q8: How does the real-time AI score work?
ah.faq.a8: Before humanizing, click 'Detect AI' to see the current AI probability score. After humanizing, the score automatically updates to show how much the AI detection risk has been reduced. Our target is always below 10% AI score.

ah.cta.title: Want to verify your humanized text?
ah.cta.desc: Use our free AI Detector to instantly check if your text will pass GPTZero, Turnitin, Copyleaks and more.
ah.ed.h1: What Makes Our AI Humanizer Different?
ah.ed.p1: Unlike basic paraphrasers, our tool doesn't just swap words — it restructures sentences, adjusts rhythm, injects natural imperfections, and mirrors authentic human writing patterns. The result is content that feels written by a real person, not a machine.
ah.ed.p2: AI detectors look for telltale signs: overly uniform sentence length, rare word choices, lack of personality. Our humanizer disrupts all of these signals simultaneously, making your content statistically indistinguishable from human writing.
ah.ed.p3: From Free (instant, no frills) to Ultra (deepest rewrite), each mode is tuned for a different use case — students need Academic, marketers need Creative, professionals need Formal. Pick the mode that fits your audience.
ah.ed.p4: Your text is processed in real time and never stored on our servers. We do not log your content, sell your data, or require account creation. What you write stays yours.
ah.ed.p5: Whether you're writing in English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, or Arabic — our engine understands the linguistic nuances of each language and humanizes content naturally in the target tongue.
ah.ed.p6: All 10 modes, up to 10,000 words per request, with no account, no credit card, no subscription. We believe powerful AI writing tools should be accessible to everyone.

aid.ed.cta.title: Humanize Your AI Text After Detection
aid.ed.cta.desc: Once you know which sentences are AI-generated, use our Humanizer to rewrite them and pass any AI detector.
aid.ed.h1: The Most Accurate Free AI Content Detector
aid.ed.p1: Our detector analyzes text across four dimensions — lexical patterns, syntactic structures, semantic coherence, and pragmatic signals — to achieve near-human-level accuracy in identifying AI-generated content from any model.
aid.ed.p2: Unlike tools that only give an overall score, we highlight every sentence with its individual AI probability. Red means high AI likelihood, yellow is mixed, green indicates human writing — giving you precise insights for editing.
aid.ed.p3: See how your text would score across GPTZero, Turnitin, Copyleaks, ZeroGPT, Writer.com, Sapling, Originality.AI, and Winston AI — all simultaneously, without visiting each site individually.
aid.ed.p4: Detects content from ChatGPT (GPT-3.5/4/4o), Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, Copilot, and any other large language model. Our training data is continuously updated as new models are released.
aid.ed.p5: Your text is never stored, logged, or shared. Detection happens in real time with zero data retention. No account required — just paste and detect.
aid.ed.p6: Paste text, upload a PDF/DOCX/TXT file, or enter a URL to scan any webpage. Supports documents up to 10MB and text up to 15,000 characters — the highest free limit available.
